findings.description: Multi-column merged headers were split and concatenated.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the headers 'ESTIMATED RESOURCES' and 'ESTIMATED PERCENT' are merged across multiple columns. In the HTML, these merged cells are split, and the top-level header text is concatenated into the sub-headers (e.g., 'ESTIMATED RESOURCES Total').

findings.description: Contextual table notes were removed from the document flow and moved to the end.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the text 'Note that the totals may be off due to rounding.' appears immediately after specific section totals. In the HTML, this inline note is removed from the table structure and consolidated at the very end of the document, separating it from the context it describes.

findings.description: Contextual table notes were removed from the document flow and moved to the end.
findings.evidence: Inline notes regarding rounding placed after section subtotals in the PDF have been extracted and moved to the bottom of the HTML document.
